description: Style NoteLook cool in these washed blue denim jeans from lee. The design is classic and the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this pair with a slim Fit shirt or graphic tee and canvas shoes for a casual look.Product DetailsBlue jeans with metal zip and button fastening, two side pockets with one change pocket, two patch pockets on the backMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash cold, separately with mild detergent as colour may bleedTurn inside out before washing and dryingDo not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and fitSkinny fit, stretch fabric, tapered leg, mid low riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
